ddls:
CREATE TABLE "workclasses" (
  "workclass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workclass */,
  "workclass_name" TEXT /* Name of the workclass (e.g., Private, Self-emp-inc) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the workclass */,
  "is_government" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the workclass is related to government employment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workclass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educations" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., Assoc-acdm, HS-grad) */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_status" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "marital_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married-civ-spouse, Widowed) */,
  "is_married" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the individual is married */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Tech-support, Machine-op-inspct) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the occupation */,
  "is_professional" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the occupation is considered professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship status */,
  "relationship_name" TEXT /* Name of the relationship status (e.g., Wife, Husband) */,
  "is_dependent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the individual is a dependent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race (e.g., White, Black) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country (e.g., United-States, Canada) */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "is_eu_member" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the country is a member of the European Union */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_states_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry of the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sectors_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)
